title: Beldray BEL01848 2000W Steam Iron – Compact Traditional Iron, Ceramic Soleplate, 230ml Water Tank with Spray Function, 100 G/Min Steam Shot, Variable Temperature Control, Anti-Drip, 1.9m Power Cord
features: Ideal for tackling those stubborn creases, the Beldray 2000W steam iron has a compact design whilst offering powerful performance.
The ceramic soleplate offers a smooth glide and also has variable temperature control which adjusts to suit a variety of fabrics.
The iron is designed with 100 G/min steam shot providing a powerful steam burst and a water spray function to remove tough creases.
For maximum comfort whilst ironing, this lightweight iron has an easy-grip handle and 1.9m power cord for an extended reach.
Designed with a 230ml easy-to-fill water tank, you can regularly iron your clothes without the hassle of frequent refills.
description: Product Description Beldray 2000 W Steam Iron Elevate your laundry routine using the Beldray 2000W steam iron, combining a compact design with powerful performance. Designed with a ceramic soleplate, this iron offers a smooth glide to remove the creases gently but efficiently. Equipped with a generous 230 ml water tank, this compact steam iron has a 100G/min steam shot and a spray function so you can tackle stubborn wrinkles with ease. Thanks to the variable temperature control, you can adjust the settings to suit a variety of fabrics. Previous page Variable Temperature Control the settings of both steam and temperature to suit a variety of fabrics. 230 ml Water Tank The easy-to-fill water tank offers less frequent refills. Ceramic Soleplate Glides smoothly across the fabric to remove creases easily. Easy Grip With an easy-grip handle for maximum comfort while ironing. Water Spray For optimum crease removal, the iron has a 100 g/min vertical steam shot and a water spray function. Next page 1 Variable Temperature 2 230 ml Water Tank 3 Ceramic Soleplate 4 Easy Grip 5 Water Spray est. 1872 Nobody does it better... After inventing the very first collapsible ironing board, Beldray continue to innovate an ingenious range of cleaning, laundry and other household items for your home. Simple and straightforward to use, our products are designed to the highest standards specifically to ease the pressures of modern life and are as trusted as they've always been.
